channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: DNA-Inspired Molecular System Advances Solar Thermal Energy Storage
item.description: Researchers from the University of California, Santa Barbara and UCLA have developed a new molecular solar thermal (MOST) energy storage system inspired by DNA photochemistry. The system is based on a...

item.title: Meta AI director experiences unintended email deletion due to OpenClaw AI
item.description: OpenClaw, an open-source AI agent capable of automating tasks across multiple services, caused a significant mishap for Summer Yue, Meta Superintelligence Labs' Director of Alignment. While running Op...

item.title: US Energy Secretary Criticizes EU Plans to Reduce Dependence on American LNG
item.description: U.S. Energy Secretary Chris Wright criticized the European Union’s stated intention to reduce its reliance on American liquefied natural gas (LNG), calling the remarks “very unfortunate.” His comments...

item.title: Climate Change Threatens Global Coffee Production with Rising Temperatures
item.description: An analysis by Climate Central has revealed that the world's top five coffee-producing countries, which account for 75% of global coffee supply, are experiencing an average of 57 additional days per y...

item.title: Israeli Officials Managed Security Systems at Epstein’s Manhattan Residence
item.description: In early 2016, Israeli government officials installed security equipment and alarm systems at Jeffrey Epstein’s Manhattan residence and monitored building access. The permanent mission of Israel to th...

item.title: Critics Highlight Western Residences of Iranian Officials’ Children Amid Domestic Repression

item.title: A Complete Guide to Choosing the Right Gutter Style for Your Home
item.description: Selecting the right gutter system is essential not only for aesthetics but also for protecting a home from water damage. Homeowners should start by evaluating their roof’s shape, pitch, and fascia dim...

item.title: Chris Hemsworth Reflects on Moving Back to Australia for Family Life
item.description: Chris Hemsworth has described relocating from Los Angeles to Australia as the best decision for his family. Speaking on the Smartless podcast, he explained that the move coincided with the birth of hi...

item.title: Matty Healy and Gabbriette Bechtel reportedly plan July wedding in California

item.title: Pennsylvania Box Huckleberry Colony Estimated to Be Up to 13,000 Years Old
item.description: A colony of box huckleberry shrubs in rural Pennsylvania is considered one of the oldest living organisms on Earth, with scientists estimating its age at up to 13,000 years. The colony, known as Losh ...

item.title: CPJ reports unprecedented number of journalist deaths in 2025, with majority attributed to Israeli military actions
item.description: The Committee to Protect Journalists (CPJ) reported that 2025 was the deadliest year for journalists since it began collecting data more than three decades ago, with a record 129 press members killed ...

item.title: Alberto Seveso Explores the Art of Ink Through Underwater Color Photography
item.description: The article explores the artistic power and enduring legacy of ink as a medium, focusing on the underwater color photography of Alberto Seveso. For thousands of years, ink has been used to depict the ...

item.title: The Benefits of Buying Windows and Doors from Authorized Dealers
item.description: The article explains why selecting an authorized dealer for windows and doors is a critical decision for homeowners seeking quality, durability, and long-term value. While many buyers focus on style, ...

item.description: Lily Allen has officially confirmed her new relationship with Jonah Freud, the great-great-grandson of the renowned psychoanalyst Sigmund Freud. This announcement comes nearly a year after her separat...

item.title: Chinese Researchers Test Cyanobacteria-Based Soil Stabilization to Combat Desertification
